creator: beastie@tardisi.com
text:
Possible fix for known 1000baseT link establishment issues with JMC25x

Fix: 

Not sure, but from what I found in Internet searches, suggesting
	that a patch to the LInux driver addresses this defect.

	http://thefrozenfire.com/2011/09/jmicron-jmc250-gigabit-nic-speed-issue-in-linux/

	http://thread.gmane.org/gmane.linux.network/211814
How-To-Repeat: 	Reboot system connected to a green 'gigabit' ethernet switch,
	sometimes it acts like there's no link ever, other times there'll be
	some connectivity eventually after a while.
